name: Encoded message
input: The first line of the input contains a single integer $N$ ($1 \le N \le 24$). The next $N$ lines contain $5$ space-separated integers each. The first three integers will be between 0 and 2, inclusive. The last two integers will be between 0 and 3, inclusive. The sum of the first three integers will be equal to the sum of the last two integers.
output: Output the result – a string of lowercase English letters.
